SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2025 BY JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF VITALY MOSHLEVETS APPEARED. DEFENDANT CONSENSYS INC. APPEARED VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY FREDERICO F. SODDU, COO & GC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM SEE SCANNNED DOCUMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSHLEVETS, VITALY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CONSENSYS INC. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF VALID SERVICE OF COMPLAINT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
